title: admin remote control in monday
excerpt: I’m the monday Admin for my company. There are many times I have to either ask people to connect their email to my own monday account, or I have to create automations or other permissions and stuff on their own accounts …

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m the monday Admin for my company. There are many times I have to either ask people to connect their email to my own monday account, or I have to create automations or other permissions and stuff on their own accounts to access or permit certain things.

I’d love the ability to connect to their monday accounts/automatically have access to other integrations such as gmail and more to be able to create from my own computer instead of theirs.
